documents_to_bring: All filed motions and court orders
Parenting time denial log (230+ days documented)
preparation_steps: Review ALL court orders currently in effect
Calculate parenting time owed (230 days denied = 18.8% of life)
Identify mediator preferences (request family law specialist)
Prepare BATNA (Best Alternative To Negotiated Agreement)
Set emotional boundaries — bring support person if allowed

custody.acceptable: Joint legal, primary physical with liberal parenting time
custody.walk_away: Less than standard parenting time (every other weekend)

parenting_time.acceptable: Extended weekends + midweek dinner + alternating holidays
parenting_time.leverage: 230 days denied — court MUST address systematic denial

decision_making.ideal: Joint legal custody — both decide medical, education, religion
decision_making.walk_away: Sole legal custody to opposing party

batna_analysis.definition: Best Alternative To Negotiated Agreement — what happens if mediation fails

litigation_strength.overall_assessment: STRONG BATNA — litigation alternatives are viable

mediation_failure_triggers: Opposing party refuses any unsupervised time
Opposing party demands sole legal custody
Opposing party brings unauthorized persons (Berry is NOT attorney)
Mediation used as fishing expedition for information
post_failure_actions: File Motion for Parenting Time (F1) immediately
File Disqualification Motion (F3) if judge involved
Escalate to FOC complaint if parenting time continues denied
Document mediation failure for appellate record
Consider filing federal §1983 if pattern continues

michigan_mediation_rules.mediator_qualifications: MCR 2.412(B) — must meet requirements of ADR plan
michigan_mediation_rules.cost: Court-connected mediation may be free or low-cost with IFP
michigan_mediation_rules.duration: Typically 2-4 hours, can extend to full day
michigan_mediation_rules.binding: NOT binding unless both parties sign agreement

structure: 2. State your goal: healthy relationship with your child
3. Briefly describe denial pattern (230 days, 18.8% of life)
5. Identify specific requests: schedule, communication, decision-making
6. Close with focus on child's best interest
opening_statement_template.tone: Calm, factual, child-focused. Never attack opposing party.
avoid: Personal attacks on Emily or Berry
